title: Glintless Books (Fabric)
description: Removes the enchantment glint effect from Enchanted Books!
body:
# - Glintless Books (Fabric) - 

***<< What does this mod do? >>***

This mod removes the enchantment glint effect from Enchanted Book items using a Mixin.

No other items are affected, so you can keep your glint on everything else!


Should be compatible with all **Minecraft 1.16.x** versions and just about any mod.

If you do manage to run into problems though, please use the *[issues page](https://github.com/Abbanon/glintlessbooks/issues)*.

Also works great with resource packs!

#### << REQUIRES [FABRIC API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) >>

![example](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/37251822/104968926-3484c080-59b5-11eb-8aec-93cbc2398cfb.png)


*Big thanks to **[Flytre7](https://www.curseforge.com/members/flytre7/projects)** for the Mixin code, and to members of **[The Fabric Project](https://discord.gg/v6v4pMv)** Discord server for their development support!*
